registrations.title: Registration Approval
registrations.subtitle: Review registration requests; approval provisions a unified identity account

dialog.reviewDescription: Verify the request details, then approve or reject
dialog.viewDescription: This request has been reviewed; details are archived below
dialog.reviewCommentPlaceholder: Optional, record the review rationale (max 500 characters)
dialog.temporaryPasswordPlaceholder: Optional, at least 10 characters; leave blank to auto-generate
dialog.temporaryPasswordHint: Used only when no account exists on the identity provider yet; the user must change it at first sign-in
dialog.temporaryPasswordTooShort: Temporary password must be at least 10 characters

config.title: Registration Settings
config.subtitle: Registration policy is defined by deployment configuration; this page is a read-only summary

policy.title: Current policy
policy.description: Registration requires admin approval by default
policy.selfRegisterValue: Enabled; the entry point is provided by the Keycloak login page
policy.approvalValue: Required by default; new requests arrive in this module as pending
policy.onApproveValue: Create or reuse the Keycloak account and mirror it into the platform user table
policy.onRejectValue: Only the review decision is recorded; no account is created

autoApprove.title: Auto-approval mode
autoApprove.description: Auto-approval is a deployment-level setting without a UI switch
autoApprove.currentValue: Off; every registration request requires manual review
autoApprove.changeValue: Operations adjusts the deployment environment variable and redeploys; this page is not editable

modeA.title: Keycloak-hosted registration (Mode A)
modeA.description: The registration form and email verification are hosted by Keycloak; the platform handles approval and provisioning
modeA.entryValue: Registration link on the Keycloak login page (realm setting registrationAllowed)
modeA.dutyValue: Record requests, run the approval flow and provision accounts; request data lives in the platform database
modeA.verifyValue: Keycloak sends and validates the verification email
modeA.reconcileValue: An hourly reconcile job compares Keycloak with platform facts and repairs drift automatically
